# bronto-cli

A command-line client for the Bronto observability platform: search and
tail logs, explore OpenTelemetry traces, send events, and manage Bronto
resources (datasets, monitors incl. templates/downtimes, dashboards,
parsers, exports, API keys, saved searches, users, groups, webhooks,
Slack integrations, limits, encryption keys, forward configs) via a
REST-backed CLI. Designed to be scriptable and agent-friendly: piped
output is JSONL for streaming commands (search/tail/traces) and a single
JSON document for everything else, typed errors with machine-readable
hints, stable exit codes, --dry-run plans for mutating calls, --debug
request tracing.

## Install

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bronto-community/bronto-cli/main/scripts/install.sh | sh

## Auth (CI / agents)

export BRONTO_API_KEY=...
export BRONTO_REGION=eu   # or us

## Examples

bronto search "status >= 500" --since 1h -o jsonl
bronto tail "level = 'error'" --window 5m
bronto send -d app -m 'hello world'

## More

- Agent usage guide: ./skill.md
- Full reference: `bronto --help` and `bronto <command> --help`
- Docs: https://docs.bronto.io
